properties.NOTES: Wildfire near Hwy 96 mile marker 16. Fire personnel on scene. Avoid the area, first responders in area.
Wildfire near Hwy 96 mile marker 16. Fire personnel on scene. Avoid the area, first responders in area.

Local authorities are responding to a fast-moving Wildfire. An EVACUATION ORDER has been issued. LEAVE NOW. Your safety is in danger if you stay. Call 911 if you need emergency assistance. Visit Alertla.org for more information.

Local authorities are responding to a Wildfire. An EVACUATION WARNING has been issued. PREPARE TO LEAVE.  Consider leaving now if you need more time to evacuate. Call 911 for emergency assistance. Visit AlertLA.org for more information.

Road closure at Robin Hill Rd; EVACUATION ORDER modified to SHELTER IN PLACE.

If you are not currently in the area, the EVACUATION ORDER remains in effect. If you are located in the area, STAY IN PLACE as fire and law enforcement assess the conditions.

More information: ready.lakecountyca.gov
